flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lorenzo Walker Technical College fell 54% between 2006 and 2009 (53.2% → 24.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lorenzo Walker Technical College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (740 → 875).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Lorenzo Walker Technical College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (80.4% → 90.9%).
